Carbon Footprint Calculator

Estimate your annual carbon footprint. Enter your transportation, energy, and lifestyle details to see your CO2 emissions.

FAQ

What is a carbon footprint?

A carbon footprint is the total amount of greenhouse gases (measured in CO2 equivalent) produced by your activities, typically measured annually.

What is the average carbon footprint?

The average American has a carbon footprint of about 16 tons CO2/year. The global average is about 4 tons. The target for climate goals is under 2 tons.

How can I reduce my carbon footprint?

Drive less or switch to EV, reduce air travel, improve home insulation, eat less meat, and use renewable energy.
